description: Single command to orchestrate full hex setup: verify prerequisites, start services in parallel, load models, configure project, validate. Eliminates manual service juggling and unclear setup steps.
name: wp-hex-bootstrap

phases.description: Add bootstrap subcommand with --profile, --skip-models, --force flags and internal modules for prereq check, service startup, model loading

tasks.description:
New bootstrap command module with:
- ClaudeCommand trait impl
- BootstrapConfig struct (profile, skip_models, force, dry_run)
- Main orchestration loop
- Imports for service starters and diagnostics
tasks.title: Create hex-cli/src/commands/bootstrap/mod.rs

tasks.title: Add bootstrap to hex-cli/src/commands/mod.rs

tasks.description:
Create:
- bootstrap/prereq.rs — OS detection, brew/apt checks, install helpers
- bootstrap/services.rs — parallel startup logic for SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, Ollama
- bootstrap/models.rs — Ollama model pull, progress output
- bootstrap/config.rs — .hex/project.json creation and defaults
- bootstrap/validate.rs — health checks and diagnostics
tasks.title: Create bootstrap submodules

phases.title: Design bootstrap command structure

phases.description: Detect OS, check for SpacetimeDB/Ollama/Rust/Bun; suggest install commands

tasks.description:
For each prerequisite (SpacetimeDB, Ollama, Rust, Bun, Cargo):
1. Check if installed (version check)
2. If missing, suggest install command (brew/apt/rustup/bun)
3. Return PrereqStatus { name, installed, version, install_cmd }
4. Collect into PrereqReport
tasks.title: Implement prereq detection in bootstrap/prereq.rs

tasks.description: Allow --skip-prereq so CI (GitHub Actions) can skip checks if run in container. Still validate after services start.
tasks.title: Add --skip-prereq flag for CI

phases.title: Implement prerequisite checking

phases.description: Start SpacetimeDB, hex-nexus, Ollama concurrently with health checks

tasks.description:
Struct ServiceStarter with methods:
- start_spacetimedb() → check if running, spawn if not, poll /api/health
- start_hex_nexus() → check if running, spawn if not, poll :5555/api/health
- start_ollama() → check if running, spawn if not, poll :11434/api/tags
- All run concurrently via tokio::join!
- Timeout: 30s per service, up to 3 retries with backoff
- Return ServiceStatus { name, running, pid, error }
tasks.title: Implement service startup in bootstrap/services.rs

tasks.description: Check if processes already running (via lsof or direct socket check) before spawning. Idempotent: skip if alive, only restart if --force.
tasks.title: Detect already-running services

phases.title: Implement parallel service startup

phases.description: Pull default inference models from Ollama with progress output

tasks.description:
struct ModelLoader with methods:
- load_tier_models(tier_defaults) → pull each model via `ollama pull <model>`
- Show progress: model name, % downloaded, ETA
- Skip if --skip-models or if already present (ollama show <model>)
- Default tiers from ADR-2604120202: qwen3:4b (T1), qwen2.5-coder:32b (T2), devstral-small-2:24b (T2.5)
- Return ModelStatus { name, loaded, size_mb, time_s }
tasks.title: Implement model loading in bootstrap/models.rs

phases.title: Implement model loading

phases.description: Run health checks and display bootstrap status table

tasks.description:
BootstrapValidator with methods:
- validate_services() → check /api/health for each service
- validate_models() → check ollama show for each tier model
- validate_config() → check .hex/project.json exists and is valid
- Collect BootstrapReport { services, models, config, ready: bool }
- Return report
tasks.title: Implement validation in bootstrap/validate.rs

phases.description: Support preview mode and profile selection (dev/ci/prod)

tasks.description:
Add to ClaudeCommand::Bootstrap:
- --profile <dev|ci|prod> (default: dev)
- --skip-models (skip model pulling)
- --force (restart services even if running)
- --dry-run (show what would be done, no side effects)
- --skip-prereq (for CI; skip OS checks)

tasks.description: cargo build -p hex-cli --release. Ensure no errors or warnings.
tasks.title: Build hex bootstrap

tasks.description:
Run: hex bootstrap --dry-run (show what would happen)
Then: hex bootstrap (full setup)
Then: hex bootstrap (idempotent — should skip already-running services)
Verify: all services responsive, models loaded, project.json created
tasks.title: Test bootstrap on dev machine

tasks.description:
Simulate failures:
- SpacetimeDB not installed: verify helpful message
- Ollama timeout: verify retry logic and graceful degrade
- Disk full during model pull: verify clear error
- Services already running: verify --force restarts them
tasks.title: Test error handling
